zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton於1274年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Roger Whatton of Scarington21歲，母親Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress15歲。他和Agnes Palmer至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1336年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾華亞頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton于1274年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Roger Whatton of Scarington21岁，母亲Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress15岁。他和Agnes Palmer至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1336年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾華亞頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

nameMeanings.name: Whatton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Whatton (Notts), or Long Whatton (Leics).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton was born in 1274, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Whatton of Scarington, was 21 and his mother, Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, was 15. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Palmer. He died in 1336, in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton est né en 1274, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Whatton of Scarington, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Palmer. Il est décédé en 1336, à Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton 1274 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Whatton of Scarington 21 und seine Mutter Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress 15. Er hatte mit Agnes Palmer mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1336 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton è nato il nel 1274 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Whatton of Scarington, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Palmer. Morì nel 1336, nel Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whattonが1274年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Whatton of Scaringtonは21歳，母Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiressは15歳であった。彼はAgnes Palmerとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1336年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウアットオンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウアットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton(이)가 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Whatton of Scarington(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Agnes Palmer(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 화엇에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 화엇에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton nasceu em 1274, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Whatton of Scarington, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes Palmer. Ele faleceu em 1336, em Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton родился в 1274 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Whatton of Scarington было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, 15. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes Palmer. Он умер в 1336 г. в местности уаттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности уаттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard III Whatton , Lord of Whatton nació en 1274, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Whatton of Scarington, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Lovetot , Co-Heiress, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes Palmer. Murió en 1336, en Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
